name: agentex
description: Agentic QA — skip the manual grind. AgenTeX plans and runs your tests for you (human-in-the-loop or fully autonomous) with structured evidence, a consolidated defect report, and an interactive HTML dashboard, driving a real browser via playwright-cli. On Azure DevOps it designs test cases from story ACs and links them to stories, estimates QA effort and creates [Testing] tasks, and reaches Azure resources mid-run via the az CLI. API & DB execution targets coming soon.
